name: use-form
description: The traffic light of a form: tracks values, errors and the submit lifecycle (pending, form-level error, server errors mapped back onto fields) so you never wire submit state by hand.

intents: manage form values, validation and submit state
handle an async form submit with pending and error states
map server validation errors back onto form fields
examples: const form = useForm({ initialValues: { email: '' }, validate: (v) => (v.email ? {} : { email: 'Required' }), onSubmit: (v) => api.signup(v) });
